errors.emptyUrl: Please enter Doubao video share link

guide.title: Guide // GUIDE
steps: Copy video share link from Doubao App
Click PARSE button to get video info
Preview the video inline or download it directly

term2svg.title: term2svg // Terminal Animation Generator
term2svg.description: Convert terminal text to animated SVG with multiple themes

input.title: Terminal Input // INPUT
input.placeholder:
Paste your terminal content here, for example:

$ git status
On branch main
  modified: src/index.js

$ git add .
$ git commit -m "fix: update styles"
[main 3f2a1c9] fix: update styles

Tip: Lines starting with $, %, or #! are recognized as commands, others as output.

rules.title: Rules // RULES
rules.commandDesc: Lines starting with $, %, #! play typing animation
rules.outputDesc: Other lines appear as command output with fade-in effect

errors.noContent: No valid content detected, please check the format.
